description_long: This object is a whimsical cluster of mushrooms, each with distinct shapes and colors, arranged together as if growing from a shared base. The largest mushroom features a smooth, tan cap with a slightly bulbous stem, while another has a deep purple, wavy-edged cap and a slender, curved stem. Smaller mushrooms with yellowish, trumpet-shaped caps emerge from a leafy green base, adding variety to the group. The stems and caps display a matte finish, with subtle shading that suggests a soft, organic texture. The arrangement includes a few rocky and leafy elements at the base, enhancing the naturalistic appearance. The overall composition evokes a fantastical or stylized urban park or garden setting.
description: A stylized cluster of mushrooms with varied cap shapes and colors, including tan, purple, and yellow, arranged on a leafy and rocky base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full cluster, highlighting the large tan mushroom, the wavy purple mushroom, and the smaller yellow mushrooms with leafy and rocky base details.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizes the height of the tan mushroom and the arrangement of the smaller mushrooms and leaves behind it.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backs of the mushrooms, with the purple and tan caps partially obscured and the rocky base more visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focuses on the wavy purple mushroom's cap and the alignment of the cluster, with the leafy base and yellow mushrooms in profile.
attribute_location_context: grassy field with rocks and leaves
